Home / Lore / Factions / Last Man Battalion

faction

Last Man Battalion

A hostile Manhattan faction that cooperates with Aaron Keener and retains a command structure after the first game's events.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

From Manhattan to Black Tusk

The Last Man Battalion survives its original Manhattan campaign as an organized force. Its connection to Keener and the later assimilation of members into Black Tusk link the first game's opposition to The Division 2's endgame faction. [1][2]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    The Last Man Battalion is one of the three violent factions SHD Agents face while securing Midtown Manhattan after activation. [1]

  2. confirmed

    Aaron Keener works with the Last Man Battalion and manipulates it while pursuing Vitaly Tchernenko and Gordon Amherst's equipment. [1]

  3. confirmed

    After the first game the Last Man Battalion retains a command structure, while Black Tusk later assimilates some of its members. [1][2]

Related records

  • Strategic Homeland Divisionopposed to
  • Aaron Keenerallied with
  • Black Tuskassimilated by

Sources

  1. [1] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: The Story So Far — Ubisoft News (2020-02-05). Accessed 2026-07-19.
  2. [2] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: Meet the Factions of Warlords of New York — Ubisoft News (2020-02-19). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: Founding, leadership and unit structure require direct first-game mission and collectible evidence.

Unofficial, source-led research into The Division universe and its real-world influences.
